# accessory

**Instance Property**

An AccessorySetupKit accessory that represents the audio device.

## Declaration

```swift
final let accessory: ASAccessory
```

## Inspecting the accessory

- **configuration**: The current configuration of the device.

items.description: The current configuration of the device.
